name: Hotel Management Software
tagline: Run your entire property from one platform
description: End-to-end hotel technology for properties of every size — front-office and reservations, channel distribution, direct booking, revenue management and a branded website. Cloud or on-premise, built for independent hotels, resorts and chains.

name: Restaurant Management Software
tagline: Smarter service, faster tables, tighter control
description: Point-of-sale and management built for restaurants, cafes, QSR and bars — orders, tables, menus, billing, inventory and multi-outlet control. Available as a cloud system or an offline-capable desktop solution.

name: Retail Management Software
tagline: One POS for a single store or a chain
description: Unified retail POS and management for supermarkets, pharmacies, fashion, electronics and more — billing, inventory, accounting and CRM across one outlet or many, on the cloud or on-premise.

name: Salon & Spa Software
tagline: Booking, billing and growth in one app
description: All-in-one cloud management for salons, spas and wellness centres — online booking, client CRM, staff and inventory management, billing and automated marketing.

name: ERP & Accounting Software
description: Cloud financial management and full ERP for growing businesses — real-time reporting, multi-entity and multi-currency, automated compliance, inventory and order management.

name: HR & Payroll Software
description: Integrated HR and payroll covering the full employee lifecycle — recruitment, onboarding, payroll with WPS, leave, self-service and performance — for businesses of every size.

name: Time & Attendance
description: Cloud and biometric time & attendance — capture shifts, rosters and overtime in real time and sync straight to payroll, with multi-location and access-control support.

name: POS Hardware & Accessories
tagline: Reliable hardware for retail and hospitality
description: A complete range of point-of-sale hardware — touch terminals, printers, barcode scanners and printers, accessories, biometric devices and networking — supplied, installed and supported across the UAE.
